content.problemStatement: Write a C program to print $
constraints: No input. Output is always fixed.
The program should print the dollar sign exactly once.
content.outputFormat: Print a dollar sign on a new line.

sampleTestCases.explanation: Prints the dollar sign once more

solution.approach: The approach to solve this problem is to simply print the dollar sign using the standard output functions of the chosen programming language. No input processing is required as the output is fixed.
solution.timeComplexity: O(1) because the program performs a constant number of operations regardless of the input (which is none in this case).
solution.spaceComplexity: O(1) because the program uses a constant amount of space to store the output string.
